race.comment: Most of these have had plenty of chances so it's hard to go past the debut run of OVER THE LOUVRE (6). Made debut over 1350m at Warwick and wound up strongly for a close-up fourth. Improver over the extra ground and can get off the mark. BON ICHI (1) ran well fresh from a break over 1300m at Toowoomba and was sound in finishing a minor placing. Fitter and another suited by the longer journey. BEST EAGLE (11) was safely held on debut then put away again. Returned over 1400m on the Sunny Coast and wasn't disgraced when beaten fourth lengths. This is easier and should improve sharply. THE HINDUSTAN (5) has had a few races for the new yard and is going okay over a sharper journey. Up in trip today but has run some decent races over further and is worth keeping safe.
